title: Syrian Lentil Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious Syrian-inspired dish made with lentils and mildly flavored pilaf.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the Syrian lentils, pilaf, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
